source_text: Duwán pa duma ibaluy manuk mga manubù tô; tô gó saguksuk.
target_text: There were yet other people transformed into birds; that is who are coucal birds.

source_text: Na tikud dán puman dutun, tô batà buringán, igpanó.
target_text: Then from there again, the unkempt child, he traveled on.

source_text: Na mà i Warì, “Muliyó kanak, muliyó tut banuwa.”
target_text: Then Wari said, “I for myself am surely going home, I am surely going home to the earth.”

source_text: Subrasubra ni dán gó ni su ágbaliyan dán ka lima ni.
target_text: This for sure is already more than enough because it is already worth five hundred.

source_text: Na, itagatdagad, ágdunggù ás Paladayán.
target_text: Now after a short time, Paladayan arrived.

source_text: Diya ágpamuyù agad ándin.
target_text: I will not ask for anything, whatever.

source_text: Tô gó tô isóddóran ku para ka gabatà.
target_text: That is what I know about babies.

source_text: Na atin kanik duwán dán ágdinágan nu, ágdagíng agung, ágtagunggù, ággát kad lipáddáng,” mà kun katô dadang.
target_text: Now if later on there is something that you hear, gongs making noise, you then shut your eyes tightly.

source_text: Tindággan ku, su tô kanak kudà, mikasirà man ka pamula.
target_text: I will settle for that, because my horse, it happened to destroy the crop.

source_text: Tun ta pagtuù katô mga nitibu, dì mému pakalayagé tô mga mataladi asta mga talatabbé.
target_text: In the belief of the indigenous people, it is not permissible for close relatives or siblings to marry each other.

source_text: Ás Paladayán
target_text: Paladayan

source_text: Dì man ágkagi.
target_text: Naturally it would not speak.

source_text: Pató nu ák dakál áppuy su ágsuru dutut langit.
target_text: The proof that they were big snakes is because they reached to heaven.

source_text: Tabak Manama, áskandin, sippang ángnganni, manté pò, na marapung sunnud igtabangan din manubù.
target_text: By the help of God, he, until the present time, he is for sure still living, and he has helped very many people.

source_text: Ni wayig ni, kitanán ta taddó át baryu ka Kisante, Makilala, North Cotabato.
target_text: As for this river, we can see it there at Barrio Kisante, Makilala, North Cotabato.

source_text: Madani kid dutun ta ágpistaan.
target_text: We are already near the place where the celebration is.

source_text: Tô migkita katô kudà migkan katô pamula nu, misóddóran din ka sadan kudà?
target_text: As for the one who saw the horse eating your crop, did he know whose horse it is?

source_text: Purisu yan gabatà yu, péskuwila yu.
target_text: Therefore your children, have them attend school.

source_text: Migsipà din ás Matutum.
target_text: He kicked Matutum.

source_text: Ás Sandawà, duwán sábbad bayi migkalyagan din, ás Matutum.
target_text: As for Sandawa, there was a woman whom he married, who was Matutum.

source_text: Duwán sábbad álló misókó tô mga tábbé din, na migbunal áskandin kallu, na midabù na kali kóli áskandin na miglugsoan kódan.
target_text: There was a day his sisters became angry, and they beat him on the head with a pestle, and he fell down and did not recover until he had become drenched with rain.

source_text: Mimu áskandin ák banuwa tut pabungan át Luwayán, na minému.
target_text: He would make a place on the mountain at Luwayan, and he was able to do so.

source_text: Atin duwán ágkamaté kandan, tô duwán inaté duma din, tô sawa din, sunnud ágsággó na gullaó áskandin.
target_text: When one of them dies, the one whose husband has died, his wife, she cries a lot and she shouts loudly.

source_text: Na dì ku pa,” mà din, “áskandin pólián sippang ka duwán makakatig gawat ka ágpanmasusu.”
target_text: “And I will not yet,” he said, “let him go home until there is already someone who knows how to perform midwifery.”

source_text: Ikgagi tô tugál agud ta kanné miglákkáp su migpadunggùé tô bulan asta álló.
target_text: The old ones said the reason there was a solar eclipse was because the moon and the sun encountered each other.

source_text: Tò gó tò kandin kapókít na mikóli áskandin taddò ta Kisante, asta áskandin ù é migulit kani inókitan din, na bánnal.
target_text: That was the way that he returned home to Kisante, and he himself is the one who told what he had gone through, which is true.

source_text: Na mému áskandan makapángngak high school ó makapángnga dutun ta kulihiyu.
target_text: Then it will be possible for them to finish high school or to finish college.

source_text: Igtakmagan din é gátták.
target_text: He touched the abdomen.

source_text: Áglámáddán i Malingling, agad tô patákkásé dád matalláng, tô gabayi kapù, gamama na matallángngù man tô ágpatákkásé.
target_text: Malingling was swallowing them, even those who just accompanied each other properly, for example women and men.

source_text: “Yakó ágrákád kanak,” mà kun katô asu.
target_text: “Do not blame me,” the dog said.

source_text: Na tô gó, atin bulanan ka dukilám, ágpanó tô bulan su migpasapé dan na atin pakitaé dan, kumangittáng é banuwa.
target_text: And that is why, when it is moonlight at night, the moon is traveling because they vowed to each other that if they meet each other, the earth would become dark.

source_text: Ándà mikapáttud tô batà.
target_text: The child was unable to control himself.

source_text: Tô gó ibaluy mangguwapuy.
target_text: That is why he was transformed into a pitta bird.

source_text: Sábbad, atin ágdunggù tò banug, gállás áskandin.
target_text: First, when the eagle would arrive, he would hide.

source_text: Atin kannun dán, na kakalyag ku, ménsà ku sikandin ka bánnal na tô kandin kudà tô migkan katô pamula i Alfredo Lambac.
target_text: If he is already here, then my desire is, I will question him if it is true that his horse was the one that ate Alfredo Lambac’s crop.

source_text: Ágpókitán dan dád dutun ta bintanà ka ánnà gimu dan ák bóbbó para ukitan katô lungun ó tô minaté na madun dan dutut lábbángngan, su mà dan atin kun ukitán tut sállat, duwán dán kun puman maté tô mga kataladi din dì madugé.
target_text: They only have him passed through a window if they do not make a hole for a passageway for the coffin or the deceased when they go to the grave site, because they say if he (the deceased) will be passed through the doorway, someone among his relatives also will die before long.

source_text: Na, salamat kumpurmiyan nu.
target_text: Now thank you for agreeing to this.

source_text: Ni sábbad, pamula nu dadat silatan, na tô sábbad dadat salláppan, ka ándà é kitaan nu ka banuwa nu.
target_text: This one, plant it on the east side, and the other one, on the west side, wherever you will find your place.

source_text: Igitur áskandin kanan Bulatukan Wayig.
target_text: He followed the Bulatukan River.

source_text: Na duwán batu kitanán nu ágtaddug ka nanga.
target_text: And there is a rock you can see that is covered with thorny vines.

source_text: Na, madigár su kannun ka.
target_text: Now it is good because you are here.

source_text: Tô ngadan katô ágpadigus ka mantu ágpamasusu kalémél.
target_text: The name of the bathing procedure for someone who has just given birth is kalémél.

source_text: Bánnal man su ibulbulan dán tò pispis na sagpu dán áglayang.
target_text: It was naturally true because the chicks had already grown feathers and were flying somewhat.

source_text: Ipánnù nit gáták i Malingling.
target_text: In Malingling’s stomach, it was full of bones.

source_text: Igpamaté dan sippang ka igpadiyáé dan.
target_text: They fought with each other until they separated from each other.

source_text: Mámmátta pa ák manuk.
target_text: I will catch a chicken.

source_text: Ándasu migbantang din é mata din, yan é misállággan din, tô áppuy ágpamatayé.
target_text: When he turned his eyes down to the side, the thing that he saw, it was some snakes fighting each other.

source_text: Una dán é asu ulì.
target_text: The dog had already gone ahead home.

source_text: Duwán mibaluy puné.
target_text: Some were transformed into green pigeons.

source_text: Mikadinág é biyya góddò tut ugis langit, na tákkó na migdunggù áskandin igsadun dutut balé katô mallaki.
target_text: A fairy princess who lived in the holy heaven happened to hear about him, and suddenly she arrived and went to the young man’s house.

source_text: Asta tô ákniyu, linisi yu tô ákniyu góddóan.
target_text: And as for you, keep the place clean where you live.

source_text: Na maté dán yan batà ku bayi.
target_text: And that daughter of mine will now die.

source_text: Iginsà i Paliman si Basagan ka ándin é ágtikganayan katô mga ranu dan.
target_text: Paliman asked Basagan what started their sadness.

source_text: Ágsaguksuk su mà din, “Suksuk kó, palaguy kó,” ó “állás kó,” su imáddangan.
target_text: It is a coucal bird because it says, “You insert yourself, you run,” or “you hide,” because it was afraid.

source_text: Yaka áglumu katô makabággé kandin ka masakit ginawa, para madrigal é kóddô yu.
target_text: Do not do what may give her painful feelings, so that your living will be good.

source_text: Na tikud taddó, migóddò áskandin na agad ándà banuwayi.
target_text: From that time on, he lived just whichever place he wished.

source_text: Datù, gawas pa katô áknikó aligra, tikud dini ta pusung ku, pólié ki dutun ta madigár mga kóddóóddô ta.
target_text: Datu, aside from your mediation, I say this from my heart, we will restore to each other our good relationship.

source_text: Nandin é kuwa nu?
target_text: Now, what do you know?

source_text: Na, duwán batu dutun duwán bónnóng állát kani prubinsya ák Bukidnon asta Cotabato.
target_text: Now there is a rock that has a human resemblance there between these provinces of Bukidnon and Cotabato.

source_text: Salamat su kannun kó.
target_text: Thank you because you are here.

source_text: Ándà din kasampátti.
target_text: He did not remember what he had been told.
